description: Unused-parameter enrichment: has_unused_param, unused_param_count, unused_params. Grounded on forgeql-pub.frozen — Rust source (stub module has trait stubs with unused params) plus a C/C++ fixture.

cases.name: unused_param_in_rust_stub
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/storage/stub.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE has_unused_param='true' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 100

cases.name: unused_param_pair_in_node_id
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE has_unused_param='true' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 10

cases.name: unused_param_count_cpp
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'tests/fixtures/enrichment_patterns.cpp' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE name='unusedParamAll' WHERE unused_param_count=3 LIMIT 5

cases.name: negative_no_high_unused_param
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE has_unused_param='true' WHERE unused_param_count>=5 LIMIT 5
